security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost blob: data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:1420 http://localhost:1420

bundle.shortDescription: Desktop worldbuilding vault for the Everend Forge suite
bundle.longDescription: Worldnotion is a desktop worldbuilding vault app. Markdown files remain the source of truth; the app adds an entity index, properties, wikilinks, and a relationship graph on top.
